name: Calibration · fixed 3-archetype set
targetHint: Tern task manager calibration fixtures (planted-defect harness)
notes: FIXED persona set for the calibration harness. Do not edit — comparability across fixtures depends on it being pinned. Three archetypes spanning low/mid/high tech and impatient/easygoing tones. Weights sum to 1.0.

personas.name: Dana Whitfield
personas.role: operations lead at a small startup
preferences: wants to get a task in fast and move on
expects the main action to be obvious
notices when buttons don't give feedback
knownContext: currently tracks work in a shared spreadsheet

personas.name: Marcus Lindqvist
preferences: gets stuck without an obvious next step
reads the screen carefully before clicking
knownContext: mostly uses email and a paper notebook

personas.name: Priya Raman
preferences: tries keyboard shortcuts and Enter to submit
knownContext: power user of Linear and Notion
